title: Oiled 4Pcs 72mm Aluminum Oil Shock Set for 1/12 1/14 1/16 RC Cars - Front/Rear Upgrade Compatible with WLtoys 144001, 124019, MJX 16208, HBX
features: Fully Customizable Damping: Design your own suspension feel! Fill with any silicone shock oil (200-500cSt recommended) to match terrain needs—oil not included.
Plug-and-Play Compatibility：Fits popular 1/12-1/16 scale models. Compatible Models for WLtoys: 144001, 124016-124019 Series; MJX: 16208/16209/16210, 14301, 14210; HBX/SCY: 1/16-1/12 Scale RC Cars
Aerospace-Grade CNC：Military-spec hard anodizing on 6061-T6 aluminum bodies, threaded collars allow tool-free pre-load tuning.
Leakproof Oil System：Dual-bladder sealing + 30WT shock oil maintains stable damping through jumps and hard cornering.
Premium Aesthetics: Smooth anodized finish seamlessly matches RcThjia upgrades, enhancing overall visual appeal.
description: Product Description Enhanced performance with these high-quality shock absorbers. Designed for compatibility with various RC models, our shocks offer smooth and responsive handling for an improved driving experience. Our oil shocks come with high quality coil springs that greatly reduce the negative effects of vibration. The degree of elastic deformation of the spring can be adjusted to mitigate the impact of the recovery process.
